name: Scalloped Summer Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Drain the squash well and mash with a potato masher.
3. Mix in all remaining ingredients except topping.
4. Spoon into a buttered shallow 1 - 1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Top with buttered crumbs.
6. Bake, uncovered, for 25 - 30 minutes until lightly browned.
